name: IBOBS Customer Support Response Latency
programText:
A = data('latency_latest_ms', filter=filter('app.business_transaction', 'customer_support_response') and filter('service', 'support-portal-api') and filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}')).max().publish(label='A')
detect(when(A > {{customer_support_latency_threshold_ms}}, lasting='30s')).publish('Customer Support Response Latency')

rule.description: Customer Support Response latency exceeded the allowed threshold.

name: IBOBS Customer Support Response Error Rate
programText:
A = data('errors', filter=filter('app.business_transaction', 'customer_support_response')).sum()
B = data('requests', filter=filter('app.business_transaction', 'customer_support_response')).sum()
C = (A / B).publish(label='A')
detect(when(C > {{customer_support_error_threshold}}, lasting='5m')).publish('Customer Support Response Errors')

rule.description: Customer Support Response error rate exceeded the allowed threshold.

name: IBOBS Knowledge Article Search Error Guardrail
programText:
A = data('errors', filter=filter('app.business_transaction', 'knowledge_article_search')).sum().publish(label='A')
detect(when(A > {{knowledge_search_error_threshold}}, lasting='3m')).publish('Knowledge Article Search Errors')

rule.description: Knowledge Article Search errors indicate blast radius expanded beyond the primary workflow.

name: IBOBS Remediation Duration High
programText:
A = data('remediation_duration_ms', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}')).mean().publish(label='A')
detect(when(A > {{remediation_duration_threshold_ms}}, lasting='5m')).publish('Remediation Duration High')

rule.description: Remediation execution or validation is taking too long.

name: IBOBS Remediation Validation Failed
programText:
A = data('validation_failed', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}')).publish(label='A')
detect(when(A > 0, lasting='1m')).publish('Remediation Validation Failed')

rule.description: A remediation action failed validation and requires operator review.

name: IBOBS Blast Radius Guardrail
programText:
A = data('affected_transactions_count', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}')).max().publish(label='A')
detect(when(A > {{max_affected_transactions}}, lasting='2m')).publish('Blast Radius Expanded')

rule.description: More business transactions are impacted than expected for the demo scenario.
